title: lavandula sampaioana subsp. lusitanica
intro: Lavandula sampaioana subsp. lusitanica is a subspecies of the lavender plant, specifically found in the Iberian Peninsula, characterized by its compact growth and distinctive purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Lavandula sampaioana subsp. lusitanica include its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and sedative properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Lavandula sampaioana subsp. lusitanica can be used in herbal preparations such as tea, essential oil, and topical creams, making it a versatile and valuable natural remedy.
